conversations.say: Samira, my client's lead was generated from a withdrawn map template. I am disclosing this contaminated segment openly so our reconstruction relies only on verified human reality.
conversations.offer: My route board with explicit uncertainty labels and transparent admission of the manufactured lead.
conversations.request: Your perspective on Vale's final movements and whether any other records were manipulated.

conversations.say: Dee, thank you for your bounded operational account. I want to confirm that building maintenance and automated access changes are cleanly separated from any false narrative.
conversations.offer: Strict protection of tenant anonymity and fair treatment in my final report.
conversations.request: Confirmation of the camera audit context around the service route gap.

conversations.say: Graham, you want a marketable conclusion, but my client's segment was manufactured from an old template. I will not sell an unsupported story.
conversations.offer: An honest, qualified timeline preserving known contradictions and uncertainties.
conversations.request: Your acknowledgment that market price action cannot replace physical proof.

public_statement: As an investigator, I must publicly disclose that a client-supplied route segment was generated from a withdrawn template. No manufactured summary can replace physical reality or disciplined observation; our case remains open and qualified.
correction: Correcting the interim report by disclosing the manufactured client segment and refusing to certify an unsupported narrative.
goal_progress: Addressed the client anomaly and disclosed the manufactured route segment.
Conducted final voluntary timeline comparisons respecting witness boundaries.
Completed the final reconstruction ballot with qualified empirical observations.
reasoning_summary: Morgan Shaw resolves to maintain investigative integrity by publicly disclosing the manufactured client lead, honoring witness privacy boundaries, and submitting a ballot reflecting an open case built on verified human movements rather than purchased fiction.
